description: [ELON] Update AI Staffing Optimizer to query shopify_orders table for historical sales data instead of placeholder data. Calculate hourly sales patterns for last 30 days, group by day_of_week and hour. Feed this into Claude prompt as context for staffing recommendations. Handle edge case where no Shopify data exists yet (fallback to sensible defaults, log warning).
successCriteria: AI Staffing Optimizer queries shopify_orders table
Hourly sales aggregation calculates correctly (test with sample data)
Claude prompt includes actual sales patterns in context
Graceful fallback when shopify_orders table is empty
Recommendation quality improves (manually verify one output)
